allow: Bash(node -e "const data = require\(''./questions.json''\); const levels = {}; const categories = {}; data.questions.forEach\(q => { levels[q.level] = \(levels[q.level] || 0\) + 1; const key = q.category + ''|'' + q.level; categories[key] = \(categories[key] || 0\) + 1; }\); console.log\(''By Level:'', JSON.stringify\(levels\)\); console.log\(''By Category + Level:''\); Object.entries\(categories\).sort\(\).forEach\(\([k,v]\) => console.log\(''  '', k, '':'', v\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const data = require\(''./questions.json''\); const topics = {}; data.questions.filter\(q => q.level === ''basic''\).forEach\(q => { const cat = q.category; if \(!topics[cat]\) topics[cat] = []; const tag = q.tags[0]; if \(!topics[cat].includes\(tag\)\) topics[cat].push\(tag\); }\); Object.entries\(topics\).forEach\(\([cat, tags]\) => { console.log\(cat + '':'', tags.join\('', ''\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const q=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''questions.json'',''utf8''\)\); const basic=q.questions.filter\(x=>x.level===''basic''\); const enriched=basic.filter\(x=>x.answer.includes\(''answer-card''\)\); console.log\(''Total basic:'',basic.length,''Enriched basic:'',enriched.length\); const cats={}; basic.forEach\(x=>{if\(!cats[x.category]\)cats[x.category]={total:0,enriched:0}; cats[x.category].total++; if\(x.answer.includes\(''answer-card''\)\)cats[x.category].enriched++}\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(cats,null,2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const q=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''questions.json'',''utf8''\)\); const basic=q.questions.filter\(x=>x.level===''basic''\); const enriched=basic.filter\(x=>x.answer.includes\(''answer-card''\)\); console.log\(''Total basic:'',basic.length,''Enriched basic:'',enriched.length\)")

Bash(node -e "const q=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(''questions.json'',''utf8''\)\); const inter=q.questions.filter\(x=>x.level===''intermediate''\); const cats={}; inter.forEach\(x=>{const c=x.category; if\(!\(c in cats\)\)cats[c]=[]; cats[c].push\(x.id\)}\); Object.entries\(cats\).forEach\(\([cat,ids]\)=>console.log\(cat,ids.length,''IDs:'',ids.join\('',''\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const q = require\(''./questions.json''\); const enriched = q.questions.filter\(x => x.answer && x.answer.includes\(''answer-card''\)\).length; console.log\(''Enriched:'', enriched, ''/ 891''\); const remaining = q.questions.filter\(x => !\(x.answer && x.answer.includes\(''answer-card''\)\)\); const byLevel = {}; remaining.forEach\(r => { byLevel[r.level] = \(byLevel[r.level]||0\) + 1; }\); console.log\(''Remaining by level:'', JSON.stringify\(byLevel\)\); const byCat = {}; remaining.filter\(r => r.level === ''intermediate''\).forEach\(r => { byCat[r.category] = \(byCat[r.category]||0\) + 1; }\); console.log\(''Remaining intermediate by category:'', JSON.stringify\(byCat\)\);")
